steps.title: Identify the implied contrast
steps.content: The phrase “______ their subjects' beauty or heroism while hiding all imperfection” uses parallel structure to reveal a contrast. If imperfection is hidden, then beauty and heroism must be emphasized. The blank must express this emphasis.

steps.title: Match the word to the contrast
steps.content:
Accentuate directly means to emphasize or highlight, which matches the contrast—romantics accentuate beauty and heroism while hiding flaws, reversing the realists' approach.

The other choices fail: counteract implies opposition (not applicable here), rectify means to correct (irrelevant), and obscure would be redundant with “hiding.” That matches choice B — B is correct.
